email.title: Daikin Onecta Email
email.description: Email of your Daikin Onecta mobile app account (Mobile App Authentication, recommended).

password.title: Daikin Onecta Password
password.description: Password of your Daikin Onecta mobile app account.

tokenFile.title: Token File (optional)
tokenFile.description: Absolute path where the OAuth2 refresh token is persisted. Leave empty to store it in the Matterbridge data directory (recommended for Docker).

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (s)
pollInterval.description: How often to refresh device state from the Onecta cloud.

whiteList.title: White List
whiteList.description: Only the devices in the list will be exposed. If the list is empty, all the devices will be exposed.

blackList.title: Black List
blackList.description: The devices in the list will not be exposed.
